## Summary

Describe the user-visible or architectural change.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant Python tests
- [ ] Relevant Lua/Neovim tests
- [ ] Packaging checks when shipped content changed
- [ ] German and English documentation updated
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Practical NVDA test when user-visible behavior changed

## Contribution terms

- [ ] I have read and accept `CONTRIBUTING.md`, including GPL-2.0-only
      distribution and the additional relicensing grant.

## Risks and limitations

List fail-open, security, compatibility, Braille, or untested behavior.
